name: knowledge-base
description: A minimal, portable, cross-agent persistent knowledge base. Stores knowledge as plain Markdown — one KB is one directory that works by copying the folder: no server, no database, syncable via Git or OneDrive. Supports multiple KBs, each declaring its own format (prose / entities, with room for more). Cross-agent adapters verified on Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity (agy); bundles a stdlib-only validator.
